category_sources: source_facts.description: image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Google Developers WebP page; source_facts.name is webp.
docs_sources: Official Google Developers WebP site has a dedicated docs path.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive uses the official WebM project libwebp release archive; libwebp official source is hosted on chromium.googlesource.com/webm/libwebp.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WebP as a lossy/lossless image compression format for web images.
